zh.lifeSummary: 當Julian Pitlesden於大約1387年出生在英國英格蘭肯特騰特爾登時，她的父親Stephen Pitlesden29歲，母親Joan De Halden19歲。她於大約1410年與Sir Edward de Guildford在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1488年在英國英格蘭肯特洛爾文登享年102歲。

nameMeanings.name: Julian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the common Late Latin name Julianus, a derivative of Julius . In classical times Julianus was a name borne not only by various minor early saints, but also by the Roman emperor Julian ‘the Apostate’, who attempted to return the Roman Empire from institutionalized Christianity to paganism. For many centuries the English name Julian was borne by women as well as men, for example by the Blessed Julian of Norwich ( c.1342– after 1413 ). The differentiation in form between Julian and Gillian did not develop until the 16th century. Julian is still occasionally used as a girl's name. Notable bearers include the British classical guitarist Julian Bream ( b. 1933 ) and the British jazz pianist and bandleader Julian Joseph ( b. 1966 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Julian Pitlesden was born about 1387, in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Stephen Pitlesden, was 29 and her mother, Joan De Halden, was 19. She married Sir Edward de Guildford about 1410, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1488, in Rolvenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 102.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julian Pitlesden est née environ 1387, à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen Pitlesden, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan De Halden, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward de Guildford environ 1410, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1488, à Rolvenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 102 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Julian Pitlesdenが約1387年にイギリスイギリスケントテンテルデンで生まれた時，父Stephen Pitlesdenは29歳，母Joan De Haldenは19歳であった。約1410年にイギリスケントでSir Edward de Guildfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1488年にイギリスイギリスケントロルベンデンで102歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Julian Pitlesden(이)가 대략 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 텐터든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen Pitlesden(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan De Halden(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1410년 영국 켄트에서 Sir Edward de Guildford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 롤븐든에서 102세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Edward de Guildford aproximadamente 1410, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. ro.Halden, Kent, England: High Halden, Kent, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julian Pitlesden родилась около 1387 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Stephen Pitlesden было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan De Halden, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward de Guildford около 1410 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1488 г. в местности ролвенден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 102 лет.
